questionHtml: The light illuminates a width of 3.5 mm of the grating. The deuterium and hydrogen red lines can just be resolved in the second-order spectrum of the diffraction grating. Show that the grating spacing of the diffraction grating is about 2 × 10–6 m.
markschemeHtml:
λ 2 Δ λ = 656.20 0.181 × 2 = 1813 «lines» ✔

so spacing is  3.5 × 10 − 3 1813  «= 1.9 × 10−6 m» ✔

 

Allow use of either wavelength or the mean value

Must see at least 2 SF for a bald correct answer
